title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Oden, Orochi as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WHAT!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This was the result of the foolishness of a ruler who stayed in his capital for too long!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Orochi misjudged the distance between the various cities of Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The enemies made their move last night!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Nounneans may be a member

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But by that time it was already too late.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the troops had crossed the great bridges...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And all the ships we needed had set sail!! The ships destroyed last night were ones we didn't need!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: hidden within the beautiful view of the maple forest that Lord Yasuie loved...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are the 4200 troops that you gathered, just as planned.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've been waiting patiently for exact-ly this moment!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: EVERY- ONE IS SAFE.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 20 years have gone by, but we have not forgotten Master Oden's legendary death!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have lived to this day believing in the revival of the Kozuki family!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go together, Samurai of the Red Scabbards!!! We are more than ready!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What is with those numbers!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The RAID on Onigashima...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: is pro- ceding as planned (1) 1)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we join that army with our group of 1200, we have a total of 5400 men!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Everyone, let's go!! Quickly!! onto onigaShima!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Fate is on their side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Wow! What a view!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not sure what's going on, but seems like every- thing's fine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Kin!! As expected of our leader!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are definitely a man worthy of my respect!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad!! I didn't stop a thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Curse you, Lin! Emon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So it was supposed to be read as "Hato"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And not tokage!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 31 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
